calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Jun-01-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Vivian Lerche telephone number 415-680-5731 specially appearing for Plaintiff CACH, LLC.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court noted that Ms. Huerta was not present. Angela Huerta's Claim Of Exemption is denied. Funds held by the levying officer are to be released to the judgment creditor. The Court will prepare a form of order.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
